channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Pour 49 €, Xiaomi sort le combo parfait pour reprendre le sport : un bracelet connecté + écouteurs sans fil
item.description: Xiaomi décide d'assembler le Smart Band 9 et les Xiaomi Redmi Buds 6 Lite dans un pack qui passe de 69,99 euros à 49,99 euros.

item.title: Google says Polymarket bets showing up in News was an ‘error’
item.description: Polymarket bets started popping up in Google News alongside legitimate news articles. But now those results aren't showing, and Google says they were never supposed to. Spokesperson Ned Adriance told The Verge that "Google News is designed to show sources that create content about current issues, events, and important topics, and we have policies for […]...

item.title: Pokémon Champions is off to a rough start
item.description: Like many live-service games before it, Pokémon Champions' launch has been messy. The free-to-start battle sim, which is out now on the Switch and Switch 2 (and also coming to mobile later this year), is plagued with bugs, some of which cause issues with basic battle mechanics - not great for a game that's only […]

item.title: Your article about AI doesn’t need AI art
item.description: The illustration for The New Yorker's profile of OpenAI CEO Sam Altman is a jump scare. Altman stands in a blue sweater with a blank expression. Around his head hovers a cluster of disembodied faces - creepy alt-Altmans, their expressions ranging from anger to open-mouthed woe. Some barely look like Altman. One final face rests […]

item.title: Google’s latest Nest Doorbells just hit their lowest prices of the year
item.description: If you’ve ever worried about porch pirates stealing packages while you’re away, a video doorbell can offer some peace of mind, letting you keep tabs on deliveries no matter where you are. Google offers some of the best around, and right now, its battery-powered, second-gen Nest Doorbell is available for $129.99 ($50 off) from Amazon and […]

item.title: Trump’s World Liberty Financial Makes FTX-esque Move, Borrows Against Its Own Crypto Token
item.description: FTX's moves were secret. Everyone can see what World Liberty Financial is doing.

item.title: Steven Soderbergh Wanted to Take ‘Bond’ Back to the ’60s
item.description: Everyone's got ideas on what Hollywood should do with James Bond, including Soderbergh.

item.title: Amazon's Ring cameras are the perfect solution to secure your home on a budget — shop today's best deals from $25.99
item.description: Amazon's best-selling Ring cameras are the perfect solution for securing your home on a budget, and I've rounded up today's best prices, starting at $25.99.

item.title: If You Make Fart Music, ChatGPT Will Be the Most Supportive Girlfriend You Could Ask For
item.description: "It feels cohesive and intentional, not just thrown together," ChatGPT said about an 8-second fart noise.

item.title: Nvidia-backed SiFive hits $3.65 billion valuation for open AI chips
item.description: The deal is interesting for a number of reasons, including that SiFive's chip designs are based on RISC-V, not x86 or ARM.

item.title: Après Artémis 2, les quatre missions spatiales incontournables de 2026
item.description: Alors que les quatre astronautes d'Artémis 2 rentrent sur Terre après dix jours de voyage historique autour de la Lune, le programme spatial mondial ne s'accorde aucune pause. Des confins de notre système solaire à la traque d'exoplanètes lointaines, les prochains mois s'annoncent aussi intenses que décisifs.

item.title: My baby deer plushie told me that Mitski’s dad was a CIA operative
item.description: Two weeks ago, I was getting ready to log off work when I got a text message. "Oh wow, I was checking out Mitski. did you know people are saying her Dad was a CIA operative?" Normally, that kind of out-of-the-blue text from a friend wouldn't faze me. This time, my eyes bugged. The unprompted […]

item.title: I've tested every iPhone since the iPhone 12, and Ceramic Shield 2 is the first iPhone glass I fully trust
item.description: No more screen protectors? After 6 months with the iPhone 17, Ceramic Shield 2 has fully proven its worth.

item.title: J’ai pu prendre en main le TV Hisense 65UR9S : le nouveau maître du contraste et de la couleur ?
item.description: En ce début d'année 2026, Hisense frappe un grand coup avec le 65UR9S, en mariant pour la première fois un rétroéclairage RGB Mini LED à une dalle mate sans reflet. J’ai pu faire quelques mesures et en voici mes impressions.
